---
description: "Audit README claims against the real Solidity, Hardhat, Docker, and testing capabilities of this repository, then tighten or implement missing pieces."
mode: ask
---

Compare `README.md` with the current repository behavior.

Produce:

1. A short list of claims that are already true.
2. A short list of claims that are aspirational or incomplete.
3. The smallest set of code and docs changes needed to reduce the gap.

When the gap affects developer workflow, prefer implementing the missing behavior instead of only rewriting the README.
